name: Cleaning Time VR
short_description: Clean up your virtual world with "Cleaning Time VR", a fun and immersive game that challenges you to clear away the clutter! Use your skills and special virtual tools to reign victorious as you scrub, wash, and mow your way to success.
detailed_description: Introducing "Cleaning Time VR", the ultimate cleaning-themed virtual reality video game that takes you on a journey through a variety of dirty and cluttered spaces. In this immersive experience, you play the role of a professional cleaner tasked with tidying up each area to perfection. Use your virtual tools and skills to scrub, wash, and mow your way to victory. Whether you're a cleaning enthusiast or just looking for that 'Oddly Satisfying' feeling, Cleaning Time VR is the perfect choice. Play now and see if you have what it takes to become the ultimate virtual cleaner!
